@seed_user username=bob password=Bob123!1 with_profile=false

# Alice searches for Bob who has no profile
1       # Login
alice
Alice1!1
4       # Find someone you know
Bob Jones   # Bob has no profile, search by name won't match
9       # Logout
3       # Exit
